steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The conclusion is that the dam benefited grass plants but didn’t benefit trees.

The key clue in the passage is the word “whereas” — it signals a contrast between two trends.

The correct answer must show one group (grass) increasing over time and the other (forest) decreasing.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Grass cover increased from 1987 to 1993 and from 1993 to 2006, whereas forest cover decreased in those periods. directly shows the vegetation pattern that supports the claim.
